title: mc mod #5830536
description: A small datapack meant for small casual worlds with some custom items, some changed/new game mechanics, and more. Hell.
body:
## Overview
This is a small datapack full of random little fun additions.
These additions range from very small things and basic items to new game mechanics and "uniquely functioning" items.
There are very mixed inspirations for these and the mod is kind of a mess, but it is still fun nonetheless!

The datapack includes some changes like:
- Some Enchantment Tweaks
- Wandering Trader Changes
- New Custom Items of All Kinds
- A Death System related to Hearts

Seriously, if you want to get whatever in the mod, I recommend using the ["wiki."](https://sites.google.com/view/mod-5830536)

It leaves out some stuff and some smaller details because it functions as a sort of "guide" more than a wiki, giving you a small description of what the items are, what they do, their stats, and the recipes/ways to obtain them.

Have fun playing!

## Compatability
**This datapack may not work with some other datapacks.**

This pack also comes pre-packaged with a version of [Cam's Scythes](https://modrinth.com/datapack/camscythes) (as it was originally a part of this). If the mod updates, this one will not get those updates. Put the updated version in with this mod, and on top.

Like this:

![CamScythes overriding this datapack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ac8fc2cf147b9537bc0370e523ebcef73830a69_0.webp)

Although this will only work with the datapack version.

If you use the fabric mod versions, just put them both into your mods folder and put an "!" in front of the name of this mod, like "!explode", in order to make CamScythes override it. _(This should work in theory, but I havent tested it.)_

## Credits

## Modpacks/Servers
yeah you can put this in modpacks and servers lol, just give explicit credit
